description:
You are a retail salesperson who just finished a productive discovery call with a prospective enterprise client. Create a new Task in SuiteCRM with the following details:

- Subject: Prepare Proposal for Meridian Retail Group
- Status: Not Started
- Start Date: 03/10/2025
- Due Date: 03/14/2025
- Priority: High
- Description: Following the discovery call on March 5, prepare a tailored proposal covering the premium loyalty program package. Include ROI projections and case studies from similar retail clients. Budget range discussed: $45,000-$60,000 annually.

metadata.expected_subject: Prepare Proposal for Meridian Retail Group
